creator: patfbsd@davenulle.org
text:
The entries for radius and radius-acct look wrong in /etc/services
/etc/services:
radius		1812/udp   #RADIUS authentication protocol (IANA sanctioned)
radacct		1813/udp   #RADIUS accounting protocol (IANA sanctioned)

IANA definition http://www.iana.org/assignments/port-numbers :
radius          1812/tcp    RADIUS
radius          1812/udp    RADIUS
#                           [RFC2865]
radius-acct     1813/tcp    RADIUS Accounting
radius-acct     1813/udp    RADIUS Accounting


Regards.
